title: Typed Records, Missingness, Provenance, Validation, and Rejection · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs typed records, missingness, provenance, validation, and rejection from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for typed provenance-preserving extraction record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.
Keep missing, empty, unknown, redacted, malformed, not-applicable, and zero values distinct through validation and export.
Attach source URL, response identity, selector or rule, node evidence, retrieval time, parser, and transformation history to decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner. Artifact under review: typed provenance-preserving extraction record.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Validation Rejection, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Validation Rejection record says typed provenance-preserving extraction record looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Validation Rejection.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof. This does not satisfy Validation Rejection for typed provenance-preserving extraction record.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Record what required effort · Review Validation Rejection
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Validation Rejection: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review site-quality team handles case 3412 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate typed missingness, raw and normalized fields, provenance, schema identity, and explicit rejection; the target owner must be able to pause the crawl; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.

steps.why: Retrieving Validation Rejection through the concrete typed provenance-preserving extraction record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.
